mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 (including ITD mutants) and multiple tyrosine kinases
additional_notes: Approved for CML/Ph+ ALL; potent against FLT3‑ITD AML; MOLM‑13 growth inhibition at low nM

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3, VEGFR, PDGFR and other kinases
additional_notes: Approved for RCC/GIST; inhibits FLT3‑ITD AML cell growth; MOLM‑13 commonly used model

mechanism: Inhibits MET and VEGFR; inhibits FLT3 including resistant mutants
additional_notes: Active in FLT3‑ITD/TKD mutant AML models; activity reported in MOLM series

mechanism: VEGFR inhibitor with additional FLT3 inhibitory activity
additional_notes: Inhibits FLT3 and growth of FLT3‑ITD AML cells; effects seen in MOLM‑13/MV4‑11
Anti‑proliferative in AML lines including FLT3‑ITD models; reported MOLM‑13 sensitivity

mechanism: SRC/ABL family kinase inhibitor; modulates FLT3/SRC pathway signaling
additional_notes: Inhibits signaling/proliferation in subsets of AML; activity noted in MOLM‑13

mechanism: ABL/KIT inhibitor with modest FLT3 activity
additional_notes: Anti‑proliferative effects in some AML models; reported activity in MOLM‑13 at higher doses

mechanism: Reversibly inhibits the 26S proteasome (20S catalytic core)
additional_notes: Induces apoptosis and inhibits growth in AML lines including MOLM‑13
Broad AML cytotoxicity; MOLM‑13 among sensitive lines
Inhibits AML cell growth in vitro; activity in MOLM‑13 reported

mechanism: Inhibits histone deacetylases to promote histone acetylation and apoptosis
additional_notes: Strong anti‑proliferative effects in AML; MOLM‑13 often low‑nM sensitive

mechanism: Selective class I histone deacetylase inhibitor
additional_notes: Potent cytotoxicity in AML cells; nanomolar range across models (MOLM‑13 included in some panels)
Inhibits proliferation and induces apoptosis in AML lines

mechanism: Inhibits mTORC1 signaling to suppress cell growth/proliferation
additional_notes: Suppresses AML proliferation and mTOR signaling; activity seen in MOLM‑13 (often cytostatic)

mechanism: Inhibits mitochondrial translation, impairing oxidative phosphorylation
additional_notes: Selectively impairs OXPHOS; inhibits AML blasts/LSCs and MOLM‑13 viability

mechanism: Inhibits protein synthesis elongation at the ribosome
additional_notes: Also known as homoharringtonine; broad activity in AML cell lines including MOLM‑13

mechanism: Inhibits aldehyde dehydrogenase; cytotoxicity potentiated by Cu2+
additional_notes: Cytotoxic to AML cells including FLT3‑ITD models; activity in MOLM‑13 reported; higher effective concentrations without copper
